titleStmt.title: SII 26.397: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 397. (A.R. No. 376 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records that the ūr (i.e. the villagers) of Marudūr sold to Iṟaivāṅkuḍi-kiḻavaṉ called as eṅgaḷ magaṉār for a sum of 75 kaḻañju of poṉ the right of using (1/5) of the water that flowed through the big sluice in the channel in their village, through which water was taken to Balipaṭṭi, a Balipuṟam of the god Tirupulippagavar. It is stated that the water thus sold was for irrigating the land of the person mentioned. It is also stated that in case of the stoppage of the flow of water for this purpose a sum of 2 kaḻañju of poṉ was to be remitted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . maturaikoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu
Iruvatiraṇṭāvatu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu marutūruro
m tiruppulippakavar tiruppalippuṟamāṉa palippaṭṭikku Eṅkaḷūril nīr
kalliṉa vākkāl vaḻiye nīr Eṅkaḷūr tūmpukalakki lippe
runtumpāl pān=ta niril Aiñcopāti nir pāya Urittākac ce
tu kuṭuttom marutūr Ūrom Eṅka makaṉār Iṟaivāṉkuṭikiḻava
ṉukku Ūrom Eṅkaḷil Icain=ta vilaipporuḷ poṉ Eḻupat
taiṅkaḻañcuṅ koṇṭu Ittūmpāl pān=tanir Aiñcopātikkum
Ituve vilaiyāvatāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Eṅkaḷ makaṉā riṟaivā
ṉkuṭi kiḻavaṟku marutūr Ūrom Innilattukku nir mañci Eṉṟu kāṭ
ṭavuñ collavum peṟātomākavum Innilattukku nir pāccā niṟ
kattiṟpāṉai Aṉṟāṭu kovukku Irukaḻaiñcu poṉ maṉṟappeṟu
vārkaḷākap paṇṇi Ivvilai dravyaṅkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutto
m Eṅkaḷ makanār Iṟaiyāṉkuṭikiḻavaṟku marutūr Ūrom Itu
panmāheśvara rakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.397 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
